response.original_title: Is Expedia available on 24/7—  Here's The Truth Guide
response.overview: Yes, Expedia offers 24/7 customer service and online booking, available 365 days a year. Travelers can get assistance anytime by calling １－８ 44－（８76）－（４013） or [AU] １－８ 44－（８76）－（４013）, making it easy to resolve issues or manage bookings whenever needed.
